items.name: ⚫ Shadow Monarch Coat [PBR]
items.description:
Walk between light and darkness with this sleek monochrome coat. Designed with layered fabrics, metallic trims, and flowing details, it captures the aura of a modern sorcerer or elite assassin. The realistic PBR materials give it a cold, reflective finish that stands out in any world.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Stylish black-and-silver color scheme
Layered asymmetrical design with elegant flow
PBR textures for metallic shine and fabric realism
Perfect for mystic, cyberpunk, or dark fantasy avatars
🔍 Keywords: shadow, dark, coat, sorcerer, assassin, futuristic, silver, monochrome, Roblox
Rule the shadows — and look flawless doing it ⚔️

items.name: Cap
items.description:
🧢 Classic Cap – Clean Style for Every Roblox Avatar

The Classic Cap is a must-have accessory for players who want a simple, cool, and timeless look. Designed to fit perfectly on any avatar, this cap adds instant style without being too flashy.

With its smooth shape and clean details, the cap works great with casual outfits, streetwear, and even competitive game looks. It’s lightweight, stylish, and perfect for everyday Roblox adventures.

⭐ Why this Cap is worth it:

🧢 Clean & Simple Design – Always looks good

👌 Perfect Fit – Comfortable on most avatars

🎮 Great for Any Game – From PvP to roleplay

🔥 Timeless Style – Never goes out of fashion

This cap isn’t just an accessory — it’s a style essential. If you want your avatar to look confident, relaxed, and modern, this cap is the right choice.

👉 Wear the Classic Cap and complete your Roblox look today!
